hooks.command: node -e "const j=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));if(!j.agent_id){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'BOSS PROTOCOL: You are the orchestrator. Delegate file modifications to specialist subagents (model=sonnet for implementation, model=haiku for trivial fixes). Direct edits are acceptable ONLY for 1-line trivial changes or plan/draft markdown files.'}}))}"

hooks.description: BriefingVault: track edit counters and refresh auto scaffolds during the session
BriefingVault: collect web links and refresh auto scaffolds during the session

hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const d='.briefing/agents';if(fs.existsSync('.briefing/INDEX.md')){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const at=j.agent_type||'unknown';var pm={explore:'research',executor:'implement','code-reviewer':'review','tdd-guide':'test',planner:'plan',debugger:'debug'};var phase=pm[at]||'';var sf='.briefing/state.json';var seq=0;try{var st=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(sf,'utf8'));seq=(parseInt(st.subagentSeq,10)||0)+1;st.subagentSeq=seq;fs.writeFileSync(sf,JSON.stringify(st,null,2)+'
')}catch(x){}var th=(j.description||j.name||'').replace(/[
]+/g,' ').slice(0,120);const e={ts:new Date().toISOString(),agent_id:j.agent_id||'unknown',agent_type:at,phase:phase,seq:seq,task_hint:th};fs.appendFileSync(d+'/agent-log.jsonl',JSON.stringify(e)+'
')}"

node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Subagent finished. (1) Read changed files yourself, (2) Run tests/diagnostics to verify, (3) Only then mark task complete. Agent execution auto-logged to .briefing/agents/agent-log.jsonl.'}}))"
node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'Teammate idle. Check TaskList — if all tasks done, send shutdown_request. If tasks remain, send next instructions.'}})"
node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'Task completed. Verify deliverable exists and check quality before accepting.'}})"

hooks.description: Persona vault: auto-update profile.md, suggestions.jsonl, and agents/YYYY-MM-DD-summary.md (writes files only, no stdout)
BriefingVault: auto-create session summary and learnings if missing at session end
BriefingVault: refresh profile/scaffolds during the conversation and emit follow-up reminders when needed
